message:
update(demo,beads,evidence): add rich editor surface with syntax lens, structural hints, and sample cycling

Upgrade the standalone playground textarea into a full authoring surface:
- Add syntax-highlighted mirror overlay with line gutter and token coloring
  (keywords, directives, nodes, arrows, comments, literals)
- Add structural hint panel showing diagram family, node/edge counts,
  subgraph density, and context-sensitive authoring advice
- Add editor metadata chips (family badge, line/char counts, URL override status)
- Add Prev/Next sample-cycling buttons with Alt+Arrow keyboard shortcuts
- Extract setCurrentSample() to centralize sample transitions across
  sample buttons, spotlight "Open in Editor", and the new cycling controls
- Wire updateEditorChrome() into input, URL-restore, and init paths so
  gutter, highlight, hints, and metadata stay synchronized
- Add responsive breakpoints for editor gutter and aux-grid on mobile/tablet
- Extend keyboard hint rewriting to handle Alt+ modifiers on macOS

Evidence and beads updates:
- evidence/demo_strategy.md: add editor-affordance contract line for the
  playground section (syntax lens, structural hints, sample-cycling, URL-safe
  source overrides)
- .beads/issues.jsonl: close bd-2u0.5.4.1 (rich editor surface) with
  implementation notes; update bd-2u0.5.3.2 and bd-2u0.5.3.3 close metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","title":"Implement responsive split-pane app shell with adaptive panel behavior","description":"## Objective
Implement a polished, responsive shell that can host all showcase modules.

## Subtasks
- Build split-pane layout with resizable/collapsible panels.
- Implement adaptive layout behavior for narrow viewports.
- Add visual hierarchy and spacing tuned for dense technical content.

## Evidence
Responsive shell verified across target breakpoints with no critical usability regressions.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Implemented the responsive split-shell layer in frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html.

Key outputs:
- added reusable split-shell CSS and shell-control button styles
- added explicit balance/collapse controls for showcase, playground, and support sections
- converted showcase/playground/support layouts onto shell-grid + shell-primary/shell-rail structure
- added responsive collapse behavior for tablet/mobile while preserving runtime truth and primary artifacts
- added client-side shell state handling via data attributes so section balance is explicit instead of accidental Tailwind layout inheritance

Validation:
- local html.parser feed passed for frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html
- structure checked against the IA contract in evidence/demo_strategy.md

Primary next dependency: bd-2u0.5.4.1 or bd-2u0.5.5.4 can now build against the shell instead of inventing new layout containers.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.164016835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T05:09:04.480066930Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T05:08:13.516469237Z","close_reason":"Implemented responsive split-shell shell controls and adaptive pane behavior","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","responsive","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.257022763Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.164016835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.581577039Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.3.3","title":"Implement persistent URL/state model for reproducible deep links","description":"## Objective
Make demo states reproducible and shareable.

## Subtasks
- Encode scenario, theme, renderer, and toggles in URL-safe state.
- Implement load/save semantics with validation/fallback.
- Provide copy-link affordance for exact state sharing.

## Evidence
Shared links reproduce equivalent state deterministically.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Implemented persistent URL/state reproduction in frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html.

Key outputs:
- added URL-safe state serialization for sample, spotlight, gallery filter/query, source override, and shell balances
- added restore-on-load behavior with validation/fallback to canonical scenario IDs
- added popstate handling so browser navigation restores equivalent showcase state
- added Copy Link affordance for exact state sharing from the playground controls
- kept the state model aligned with existing shell/scenario state instead of introducing a separate store

Validation:
- local html.parser feed passed
- state helper wiring checked against existing sample/gallery/shell transitions

Primary downstream effect: editor and diagnostics beads can now assume reproducible deep-link state exists.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.261023688Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T05:26:16.982200580Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T05:26:16.981997205Z","close_reason":"Implemented URL-safe reproducible showcase state and share-link flow","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","state","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.261023688Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.673408596Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.4","title":"Implement live authoring loop with diagnostics-first feedback","description":"## Why this exists
Live authoring is the core interactive loop. It must feel immediate, informative, and safe under malformed input.

## Scope
- Rich editor integration.
- Debounced/cancellable pipeline from text to render.
- Diagnostics and fallback UX.

## Deliverables
- Authoring loop with low-latency feedback.
- Actionable diagnostics integrated with source text.
- Stable fallback rendering path for failure modes.

## Acceptance Evidence
Typing/editing, diagnostics, and rendering remain responsive and informative under both normal and malformed inputs.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.357694813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:19.771620249Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","diagnostics","editor"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.357694813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.428387178Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.532003432Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":114,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","title":"Implement debounced+cancellable parse→layout→render pipeline","description":"## Objective
Connect editor changes to rendering with robust control flow.

## Subtasks
- Implement debounced update scheduling.
- Cancel stale parse/layout/render jobs when newer edits arrive.
- Surface stage-level timing and error boundaries.

## Evidence
No stale-render race conditions; latest edit always wins deterministically.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.556585258Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.484628457Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","performance","pipeline"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.484588462Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.556585258Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.867166173Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","title":"Implement inline diagnostics, remediation hints, and safe fallback preview","description":"## Objective
Ensure users understand and recover from issues quickly.

## Subtasks
- Map diagnostics to inline markers and a structured diagnostics panel.
- Provide remediation hints and confidence context.
- Provide graceful fallback preview for unrecoverable states.

## Evidence
Error scenarios remain navigable with actionable user guidance.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.657477704Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:19.293793609Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","diagnostics","recovery"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.157010471Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.657477704Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.057274380Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5","title":"Implement feature spotlight modules for core differentiators","description":"## Why this exists
The demo must explicitly spotlight differentiators instead of hoping users discover them. This track packages capabilities into guided, testable modules.

## Scope
- Layout/cycle strategy explorer.
- Theme/style studio.
- Export artifact studio.
- Feature-complete gallery/compare mode.

## Deliverables
- Distinct showcase modules with clear educational framing.
- Module-level controls and validation artifacts.
- Unified module navigation and state interoperability.

## Acceptance Evidence
A reviewer can verify each major capability by running named showcase modules end-to-end.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.755713848Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:19.138166493Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","features","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.755713848Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.632971710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":115,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"}]}

@@ -262,6 +262,7 @@ Playground section:
 - Left column owns authoring and raw API inspection: source editor, `detectType()`, `sourceSpans()`, and `parse()`.
 - Right column owns rendered outputs and matrix-backed evidence: FrankenMermaid SVG, Mermaid baseline, canvas surface, capability summary, and capability table.
 - Render actions must be explicit and reproducible; any debounced or cancellable pipeline later added must preserve the current "what output corresponds to what input" clarity.
+- The editor surface should expose authoring affordances directly in the page: syntax lens, structural hints, sample-cycling shortcuts, and URL-safe source overrides that survive deep-link restoration.
 - The section should function as the home for future telemetry, determinism, diagnostics, and export labs rather than scattering those surfaces across the page.
 
 Support Evidence section:
